title: dianella incollata
intro: Dianella incollata, also known as Flax Lily or Blue Flax Lily, is a perennial plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits such as soothing and calming effects. Dianella incollata can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to create topical applications and teas for medicinal purposes.
